retry_reason: If tee_ctx is NULL, no action needed; otherwise the put operations are unconditional and not retryable because they free already-referenced objects.
contract_summary: This is a deinitialization put wrapper that safely releases the TEE context, session, and shared memory pool associated with the amd_pmf_dev. It sets dev->tee_ctx to NULL after freeing to prevent double-free. The caller must not use any TEE objects (dev->tee_ctx, dev->session_id, dev->fw_shm_pool) after calling this function. Typically called during driver tear-down.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release TEE resources (shared memory, session, context) by calling put functions (tee_shm_free, tee_client_close_context, and tee_client_close_session) and NULL out the pointer. No other business logic.

check.reason: Both operations correctly trace from the function parameter (dev) through pointer fields to the refcount fields that are decremented by the callee put functions (tee_shm_free and tee_client_close_context). The type chains match the callee information and the code structure. The segment counts are consistent (4 segments each, 4 types each).
